title: Subterranean Wilderness Revival
description: Adding exciting new cave biomes and bringing you the cave update you always wanted
body:
![Jungle Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/047fd28facf5e16c8a6508119d8d7a7529e6d936.png)A faithful and modernized continuation of the legendary Subterranean Wilderness by Melonslise, transforming Minecraft’s stone caves into living, diverse underground ecosystems, updated for newer versions of Minecraft.

What exactly does the mod add?

Instead of the same generic and monotonous caves, the underground of your world is now full of unique and atmospheric biomes:

- Icy Caves: walls full of shining ice, pure and cold formations that look like they came straight out of a glacier.
- Tropical, Jungle and Mossy Caves: packed with lush vegetation, thick moss, hanging plants, and that humid vibe that makes them feel really alive.
- Fungal Caves: especially under mushroom islands, with giant mushrooms, and that magical mysterious atmosphere.
- Volcanic Caves: lava, glowing igneous rocks, and a dangerous but spectacular environment.
- Desert and Mesa Caves: dry formations, sandstones and an arid atmosphere.
- Coral Caves: vibrant corals, crystal clear water, and underwater life deep underground.
 
 And many more...
  
The mod is made to work well with most exploration and worldgen packs like Biomes O' Plenty or Terralith. Even so, I recommend trying it in a new world.

If you always wanted the "Cave Update" from Mojang... now you have one :)

Original mod page: [Subterranean Wilderness - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/subterranean-wilderness)
